docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER EDWARDS-LE BLANC, KAREN
ORDER RE PETITION FOR ORDER OF RELEIF FROM THE PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.4

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KAREN EDWARDS-LE BLANC'S (NTC) PETITION FOR ORDER OF RELIEF FROM THE PROVISIONS OF GOV'T CODE 945.4 IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED "MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT" AS REQUIRED BY CODE CIV. PROC. 946.6(C)(1). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-11-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NTC OF HRG ON PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER EDWARDS-LE BLANC, KAREN HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY DEFTS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KAREN EDWARDS-LE BLANC'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER OF RELIEF IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 26, 2013 TO GIVE MS. EDWARDS-LE BLANC THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. MS. EDWARDS-LE BLANC MUST IMMEDIATELY DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE PETITION AND ALL MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
(Ntc) Petition For Order Of Relief From The Provisions Of Gov'T Code 945.4
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHELLE MANDEL, ESQ., 415.626.5400, FOR PETITIONER KAREN EDWARDS-LE BLANC.
TERESA TAN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. The Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KAREN EDWARDS-LE BLANC'S (Ntc) Petition For Order Of Relief From The Provisions Of Gov'T Code 945.4 IS
Denied. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Plaintiff has not established "mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect" as required by Code Civ. Proc. 946.6(c)(1). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HOWARD S. EHRLICH, TEL. NO. (954) 977-6622 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. TERESA TAN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4272 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KAREN EDWARDS-LE BLANC'S Hearing for relief from the Provisions of Gov. Code Section 945.4- The petition for order of relief is denied without prejudice. Petitioner does not present any admissible evidence to support the application. The petition is unverified and petitioner fails to file any declarations. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KAREN EDWARDS-LE BLANC'S HEArINg On Petition FOR ORDER OF RELIEF IS Continued on the court's own motion to February 26, 2013 to give Ms. Edwards-Le Blanc the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Ms. Edwards-Le Blanc must immediately deliver courtesy copies of the petition and all moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
